title: Agentic market-intelligence notebook
research_question: What competitor and market features should ProductOS add to research and auto-research so it can compete with direct PM tools, adjacent work platforms, agentic research products, and CI software?
synthesis_hypothesis: The market is moving from drafting assistance toward grounded agentic research, continuous intelligence refresh, and visible human control. ProductOS can differentiate by combining PM-native structure with stronger validation and loophole memory.
open_questions: Which research actions should remain PM-triggered and which should auto-refresh on schedule?
What minimum freshness and contradiction checks are required before ProductOS can publish a recommendation?
